svg.title: Docker Compose network internals
svg.desc: Shows how docker compose up creates a private bridge network, attaches all services to it, registers DNS names, and exposes only specified ports to the host.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the web container connect to the api container in Docker Compose?')
sendPrompt('How does the api container talk to the db container using service name?')
sendPrompt('How does Docker Compose handle database persistence with volumes?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis work as a cache in Docker Compose?')

svg.text: Containers talk by service name — Docker's DNS maps "db" to the db container's internal IP automatically
